error_signature: unable to insert data into newly created Google Sheet
title: Data insertion failure in new Google Sheet
symptom: After creating a new Google Sheet, the user cannot insert data due to column mapping issues. The error arises when trying to map columns that do not exist in the newly created sheet.
applies_when: Creating a new sheet and attempting to insert data
not_this_if: The sheet already has the required columns
root_cause: The error occurs because the user is trying to map columns for data insertion in a newly created Google Sheet where those columns have not been established yet. Manual selection of a different sheet further complicates the mapping process.
fix_steps: Delete the current column mappings in the Google Sheets node.
Select the automatic mapping option to let n8n create the necessary columns.
Alternatively, manually create the required columns in the Google Sheet before mapping.
agent_instruction: Choose automatic mapping in the Google Sheets node or create the required columns manually in the sheet.
